Package com.rays.service

Interface UserServiceInt

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BaseServiceInt<UserDTO>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    UserServiceImpl
    public interface UserServiceInt
extends BaseServiceInt<UserDTO>
    UserServiceInt is the service interface for the User entity. This interface extends BaseServiceInt and defines the contract for performing business operations on UserDTO objects.

    This interface inherits standard CRUD and search operations from BaseServiceInt and adds user-specific business logic such as authentication, registration, password management, and user lookup by login ID.

    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      UserDTO authenticate​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String password)
      Authenticates a user based on login ID and password.
      UserDTO changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId, java.lang.String oldPassword, java.lang.String newPassword, UserContext userContext)
      Changes the password for a user after validating the old password.
      UserDTO findByLoginId​(java.lang.String name, UserContext userContext)
      Finds a user by their login ID.
      UserDTO forgotPassword​(java.lang.String loginId)
      Handles forgot password functionality.
      UserDTO register​(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Registers a new user in the system.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.rays.common.BaseServiceInt

        add, delete, findById, findByUniqueKey, save, search, search, update

    • Method Detail

      • findByLoginId

        UserDTO findByLoginId​(java.lang.String name,
                      UserContext userContext)
        Finds a user by their login ID.
        Parameters:
        name - the login ID to search for
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the UserDTO if found, or null if no user exists with the given login ID

      • register

        UserDTO register​(UserDTO dto,
                 UserContext userContext)
        Registers a new user in the system.
        Parameters:
        dto - the UserDTO containing user details
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the registered UserDTO with the generated ID

      • authenticate

        UserDTO authenticate​(java.lang.String loginId,
                     java.lang.String password)
        Authenticates a user based on login ID and password.
        Parameters:
        loginId - the login ID of the user
        password - the password to validate
        Returns:
        the authenticated UserDTO if credentials are valid, or null otherwise

      • forgotPassword

        UserDTO forgotPassword​(java.lang.String loginId)
        Handles forgot password functionality. Retrieves the user by login ID for password recovery.
        Parameters:
        loginId - the login ID of the user
        Returns:
        the UserDTO if found, or null if no user exists with the given login ID

      • changePassword

        UserDTO changePassword​(java.lang.String loginId,
                       java.lang.String oldPassword,
                       java.lang.String newPassword,
                       UserContext userContext)
        Changes the password for a user after validating the old password.
        Parameters:
        loginId - the login ID of the user
        oldPassword - the current password for verification
        newPassword - the new password to set
        userContext - the user context containing current user information
        Returns:
        the updated UserDTO if password change is successful, or null if old password is invalid
